CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, amount FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE expenses (id INTEGER, cost FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE summary AS SELECT sum(amount) as total_sales FROM sales UNION ALL SELECT sum(cost) as total_expenses FROM expenses;
SELECT (SELECT sum(amount) FROM sales) - (SELECT sum(cost) FROM expenses) as net_profit;
CREATE TABLE region_sales (region VARCHAR, amount FLOAT);
SELECT region, sum(amount) FROM region_sales GROUP BY region;
CREATE TABLE combined AS SELECT s.id, s.amount, e.cost FROM sales s JOIN expenses e ON s.id = e.id;
SELECT sum(amount) - sum(cost) as profit FROM combined;
CREATE TABLE nested_sales AS SELECT id, sum(amount) as total_amount FROM sales GROUP BY id HAVING total_amount > 50;
SELECT sum(total_amount) as grand_total FROM nested_sales;
